title: venezuelan aerated egg white wrap
description: a crowd-pleasing venezuelan dish made with steamed egg whites wrapped in a leafy green, served on a robata grill. this vegetarian-friendly recipe combines the richness of egg whites with the simplicity of fresh vegetables.
instructions: whisk egg whites in a mixing bowl until frothy.
add a pinch of salt and continue whisking until soft peaks form.
heat a robata grill to medium-high heat.
place a large collard green leaf on the grill, with the stem facing up.
